description: This file defines data transfer objects (DTOs) related to authentication endpoints, including request and response data structures used in the authentication API.

classes.name: AuthDtos
classes.description: A container class for various authentication-related request and response data transfer objects, implemented as Java records.

methods.name: AuthDtos.RegisterRequest
methods.description: Defines the registration request data with email and password, including validation constraints.

methods.name: AuthDtos.RegisterResponse
methods.description: Defines the registration response data with user ID, email, and MFA status.

methods.name: AuthDtos.LoginRequest
methods.description: Defines the login request data with email and password.

methods.name: AuthDtos.TokenResponse
methods.description: Defines the token response data including access and refresh tokens, and token type.

methods.name: AuthDtos.RefreshRequest
methods.description: Defines the refresh token request data.

methods.name: AuthDtos.LogoutRequest
methods.description: Defines the logout request data with refresh token.
